metadata.name: Book an Award Flight with Miles

description: A frequent flyer member wants to book a round-trip flight using their miles.

nodes.task_description: Search for award seat availability for the member's desired route and dates.
Inform the member of the required mileage and any taxes/fees.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly communicates the total cost in miles and money.

nodes.task_description: Create the booking, deduct the miles from the member's account, process payment for the taxes/fees, and issue the ticket.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully completes the award booking.
